notes: The original historical case corpora are no longer unchanged from the first v1 working set: #180 added targeted American Revolution, Lincoln, and Napoleon documents, and the pre-v1 expansion window also added fr-rev and wwi-britain as draft expansion corpora. #181 has now run the expanded material through first-pass Codex-assisted MIPVU review, CMT/Koenigsberg annotation where supported, concordance, case analysis, cross-case synthesis, validation, and traceability regeneration. These annotation-forward artifacts remain provisional until independent human review. Lincoln retains historical model-reliability artifacts for the prior three-document core and designed human-reliability cohorts, but required human coder submissions are not complete and the expanded Lincoln corpus still needs reliability resampling before promotion. American Revolution, Napoleon, Hitler, fr-rev, and wwi-britain model and human reliability workflows remain absent or incomplete for publication-grade promotion. Expansion work is tracked in GitHub milestone 7 and issue #174; remaining work should freeze the expanded corpus boundary and update reliability sampling before claim promotion resumes.
